prompt: I'm building a new mobile game — a fantasy city-builder where you grow a kingdom by completing puzzle battles. It's free-to-play, targeting casual to mid-core players, age 18-35. We're not on the stores yet, still 3 months from soft launch. Help me set up my game marketing context.

assertions.text: Launch status is set to pre-launch (not soft launch or global)
Includes genre classification from the taxonomy (casual, mid-core, or hybrid)
Monetization model section is present and identifies F2P + IAP
Does not fabricate specific KPI numbers without flagging them as assumptions
Core loop is described specifically (puzzle battles + city building), not just 'gameplay'
